original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求换一个深色背景，主文案：透光如星 驱散浊气  副文案：平安顺遂 白水晶
optimized_prompt:
[
  {
    "nano_banana_en": "[Visual Description]
Subject: A minimalist luxury bracelet composed of uniform, perfectly spherical clear beads strung together. Each sphere exhibits high transparency and refractive qualities, creating distinct specular highlights. 
Environment: Deep, mysterious dark background, possibly textured black slate or dark obsidian surface with subtle ripples of light. The lighting is dramatic and focused, emphasizing the crystal clarity of the beads against the dark void. A faint, ethereal mist swirls around the base to suggest spiritual purification. 
Style: High-end commercial photography, macro shot, 8k resolution, elegant, Zen aesthetic.

[Text & UI Layout]
Layout Strategy: Taobao Main Image (1:1 ratio). Product centered on a slightly elevated display. Text placed in the upper empty space or to the side.
Main Title: "透光如星 驱散浊气" (Clean, serif font, glowing white or silver effect)
Sub Title: "平安顺遂 白水晶" (Smaller sans-serif font, slightly dimmed white)
CTA/Badge: Minimalist border or icon implying "Top Quality"",
    "seadream_cn": "[视觉画面描述]
主体：一串极简奢华的手串，由均匀、完美的球形透明珠子串成。每颗珠子都展现出高透明度和折射质感，具有明显的镜面高光。
环境：深邃神秘的暗色背景，如黑色岩板或黑曜石表面，带有微弱的光影涟漪。灯光戏剧化且聚焦，在黑暗的虚空中突显珠子的水晶般清澈。底部缭绕着淡淡的空灵薄雾，暗示净化心灵的意境。
风格：高端商业摄影，微距拍摄，8k分辨率，优雅，禅意美学。

[文案与UI布局]
布局策略：淘宝主图（1:1比例）。产品居中放置于略微抬高的展示台上。文字置于上方留白处或侧边。
主标题："透光如星 驱散浊气"（干净的衬线字体，发光的白色或银色效果）
副标题："平安顺遂 白水晶"（较小的无衬线字体，略微暗淡的白色）
角标/标签：极简边框或图标暗示“臻选品质”",
    "layout_logic": "Since the product is transparent white crystal, a deep black or dark charcoal background is essential to create contrast (Light vs Dark). The text should use a glowing white or metallic silver effect to echo the 'starlight' theme of the copy. Place the bracelet slightly lower-center to leave ample negative space at the top for the vertical or horizontal typography."
  }
